ab: pasuya, os’o ta’payo’a ’o ’empicu’u, teko peela yuvahneni a’o?
ch: W:pasuya，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: pasuya, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: mi’o maezo uk’as’a. ’a nuu to tanivu eni.
teko peela yuvahneni n’a a’o? ta’u c’o osna yoveia.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.
Sure.
Thank you and thank tanivu for me.
May I help you?

ab: te’o yoveia ’e mo yuso ci tposʉ.
en: I want to return these two books.
No problem and what else do you need?

ab: te’o i’vahon’a yovaho ta mo tuyu ci tposʉ.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: os’o cohivi, talʉa yoveia ho tena c’u miteuhi.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.
You haven’t returned me the eraser.
I returned it yesterday.

ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了?
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?
Did you lend it to pasuya?
I don’t know. I will go and ask her.
I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: tanivu, isi yuvahneni suu to pasuya ’e ocmʉyʉ ci yʉsʉ?
en: tanivu, did pasuya lend you this coat?

ab: o’a s’a, ’a isi phini to ino’u.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mo totiski to ocmʉyʉ ci yʉsʉ to pasuya.
en: voyu’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: mo koa’onga ’o ocmʉyʉ ci yʉsʉsi, mo yupa h’unasi ta nuuto.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: tanivu, miko yuvaho no peisu to pasuya?
en: tanivu, did you borrow money from pasuya?

ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.
Then, when will you return the money?
I will return to him tomorrow.
Okay, I will tell pasuya for you.
